{{CargoRelic
|name=Relics of the Three Kings
|class_id=22841
|rank=SSS
|affct=FAITH
|source=
|description=The Relics of the Three Kings are the bones of the three wise men from the East who served the infant Jesus, housed in a shrine at Cologne Cathedral, also known as the Shrine of the Three Kings. According to the Bible, the three Magi from the East saw a great star over Bethlehem and followed it to the birthplace of Jesus, offering gifts of gold, frankincense, and myrrh. This legend is also known as the Adoration of the Magi.
|fame=60
|art=71
|fth=108
|civ=60
|tech=63
|ss1=Snail Leadership +3<br>Angel Minion Recovery SPD +6%<br>Per 60 Angel Minions in battle:<br>> Troop HARD Stats +3
|ss2=Snail Leadership +4<br>Angel Minion Recovery SPD +8%<br>Per 60 Angel Minions in battle:<br>> Troop HARD Stats +6
|ss3=Snail Leadership +5<br>Angel Minion Recovery SPD +10%<br>Per 60 Angel Minions in battle:<br>> Troop HARD Stats +9
|ss4=Snail Leadership +7<br>Angel Minion Recovery SPD +14%<br>Per 60 Angel Minions in battle:<br>> Troop HARD Stats +15
|ss5=Snail Leadership +9<br>Angel Minion Recovery SPD +18%<br>Per 60 Angel Minions in battle:<br>> Troop HARD Stats +21
|ss6=Snail Leadership +12<br>Angel Minion Recovery SPD +24%<br>Per 60 Angel Minions in battle:<br>> Troop HARD Stats +30
|ss7=Snail Leadership +12<br>Angel Minion Recovery SPD +24%<br>Per 60 Angel Minions in battle:<br>> Troop HARD Stats +30<br>Snail Leadership +5 (Awakened)
|skill1=[[File:Bharata skill III.png|50px]]Place in Bharata Museum: In Bharata, 2x B-tad Drops +15%
|skill2=[[File:Bharata skill III.png|50px]]Place in Bharata Museum: In Bharata, Snail RUSH +600
|skill3=[[File:Bharata skill III.png|50px]]Place in Bharata Museum: This Relic's FTH +15
}}
